text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aha—Jordan! We meet again, after<n>countless
eons! I'm gonna roll you up<n>like a datemaki!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you talking about?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any last words? With the<n>flick of a
finger, I will—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...Phew, at least it's not that deep. Here,<n>I'll lend
you my nail file.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Do you wanna put on a base and top<n>coat too?
Look, like this?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? ...Whoooaaa! We've got a genius<n>in our
midst and I didn't even know it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know what, Jordan? You should<n>enter a
contest! I, the mighty Golshi,<n>shall handle all the
entry paperwork!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: A contest?! I'm not a pro or anything...But now you mention it, I am kinda prolevel. I could try, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Show them your burning<n>passion
at the miniature town model<n>contest!
